title: Get Workout Summary
description: Exposes the ground contact time and step cadence collected during Run workouts:

response_fields.name: workoutSummary : logId
response_fields.description: Exercise id of the structured workout

response_fields.name: workoutSummary : mobilityMetrics : avgCadenceStepsPerMinute
response_fields.description: Average workout cadence in steps per minute

response_fields.name: workoutSummary : mobilityMetrics : avgGroundContactTimeMilliseconds
response_fields.description: Average ground contact time in ms
